name: Subaru Shibutani
description: {{nihongo|'''Subaru Shibutani'''|渋谷 すばる|Shibutani Subaru|born September 22, 1981}} is a Japanese singer, actor, and lyricist. He began his career as a member of [[Johnny & Associates|Kansai Johnny's Jr.]] and later served as the [[Lead vocalist|main vocalist]] of the Japanese boy band [[Super Eight (group)|Kanjani Eight]] (now known as Super Eight), which originally debuted as an [[enka]] group. He left the group in 2018. His first solo album, ''Nisai'', was released in October 2019.
